# Pull Request

## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

Fixes # (issue number, if applicable)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behaviour to change)
- [ ] Documentation update only
- [ ] Test / CI improvement
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## How has this been tested?

Describe the tests you ran. Include both unit tests and any manual verification (e.g. running a small training job).

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make type-check` passes
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour
- [ ] Coverage stayed at or above 85%

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [style guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md#style-guide)
- [ ] I have run `pre-commit run --all-files`
- [ ] I have added documentation for new public API
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the `[Unreleased]` section
- [ ] If this changes paper numbers, I have noted which figures / tables are affected
- [ ] If this introduces a new dependency, it is necessary and justified

## Related issues / PRs

- Closes #...
- Related to #...

## Reviewer notes

Anything specific you'd like the reviewer to focus on?
